description_long: This object is a rectangular, black stereo speaker system with a minimalist design. The front face features two prominent circular speaker cones, one above the other, set into a smooth, matte-finished enclosure. The sides and back are plain, with no visible ports, controls, or branding, emphasizing a clean and modern aesthetic. The speaker cones are recessed and surrounded by slightly raised rings, giving a sense of depth and acoustic focus. The overall build appears solid and robust, likely constructed from dense plastic or composite material. This type of speaker would typically be found in urban environments such as home entertainment setups, garages, or public event spaces.
description: A black, rectangular stereo speaker system with two circular speaker cones on the front and a smooth, matte exterior.
description_view_0: A plain, featureless black side panel with smooth edges.
description_view_1: The front face showing two circular speaker cones, one above the other, set into a matte black enclosure.
description_view_2: Another plain, featureless black side panel, mirroring the opposite side.
description_view_3: A solid, featureless black back panel with no visible ports or controls.
